blockers.summary: No checked-in real ORCHESTRATOR_MODULE_FACTORIES set proves orchestrator.definitions:defs production Phase 0-3 end-to-end.
P2 durable real-data closure injects fake Phase 0 and Phase 1 providers.
P3 graph functional slice is not closed.
Default shell skips PostgreSQL manifest/formal tests without DATABASE_URL or DP_PG_DSN.
